heroHeading:
Hi, I'm Phairen —
and I've been at this since I could reach the counter.
storyP1: It started the way most good things do — with a craving and a rolling pin. Growing up in East Texas, I learned early that the best food comes from patient hands and honest ingredients. My grandmother's kitchen smelled like butter and brown sugar year-round, and somewhere between her sugar cookies and her big family reunions with lots of food, I knew this was what I was meant to do. I take time with each one of my baked goods, and have worked hard to make them something that everyone can enjoy! Whether it be sugar-free, gluten-free, or in need of a sweet fixing, we've got you covered!
storyP2: Stillwater Bakery is my Christian-based at home bakery! If it wasn't for God, I wouldn't be able to start this dream of mine that I've had since I was a little girl. He truly has helped me find my passion again after struggling with post-partum depression. God has really shown me what is means to be lead by the shepherd in every moment; especially the dark ones. He has taught me to trust in Him, and to stay where He leads me... by green pastures and Stillwaters!
storyP3: As a licensed Texas cottage baker, I bake in small batches from my home kitchen — which means everything you get is made with the same care I'd put into baking for my own family. Because honestly, that's exactly what you are.

values.title: Made to Order
values.description: Nothing sits on a shelf. Every item is baked fresh when you order it.

values.title: Local Ingredients
values.description: Sourced from East Texas farmers markets when possible!

values.title: Small Batches
values.description: Quality over quantity, always. Every item gets my full attention.
